---
title: "Construcción de Ingresos Reales y Análisis Trimestral"
author: "Nombre del estudiante"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
echo = TRUE,
message = FALSE,
warning = FALSE
)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(stringr)
library(here)
library(scales)

# Se cargan las bases ya procesadas (nominales)

load(here("data", "processed", "dat_ok.RData"))
load(here("data", "processed", "dat_w.RData"))

# Vista rápida

dplyr::glimpse(dat_ok)

ipc_raw <- read_excel(
here("data", "ipc", "PEM_VAR_IPC_2018_HIST.xlsx")
)

# Tabla de meses abreviados

mes_map_abbr <- c(
"ene"=1,"feb"=2,"mar"=3,"abr"=4,"may"=5,"jun"=6,
"jul"=7,"ago"=8,"sep"=9,"oct"=10,"nov"=11,"dic"=12
)

ipc <- ipc_raw %>%
rename(
periodo = Periodo,
var_mensual = `1. IPC General (empalme BCCh)`
) %>%
mutate(
periodo = tolower(trimws(periodo)),
mes_txt = str_extract(periodo, "^[a-z]+"),
year    = as.integer(str_extract(periodo, "\d{4}")),
month   = mes_map_abbr[mes_txt],
var_mensual = as.numeric(var_mensual)
) %>%
filter(!is.na(year), !is.na(month)) %>%
arrange(year, month) %>%
mutate(
fecha = as.Date(sprintf("%04d-%02d-01", year, month))
)

# Índice acumulado

ipc <- ipc %>%
mutate(
factor       = 1 + var_mensual/100,
indice_bruto = 100 * cumprod(factor)
)

# Reescalar para que dic-2018 = 100

ipc_base <- ipc %>%
filter(year == 2018, month == 12) %>%
pull(indice_bruto)

ipc <- ipc %>%
mutate(IPC = indice_bruto / ipc_base * 100)

dat_real <- dat_ok %>%
left_join(ipc %>% select(year, month, IPC),
by = c("year_final" = "year", "month" = "month")) %>%
mutate(ing_real = ingsueld * (100 / IPC))

dat_real_w <- dat_w %>%
left_join(ipc %>% select(year, month, IPC),
by = c("year_final" = "year", "month" = "month")) %>%
mutate(ing_real = ingsueld_w * (100 / IPC))

q_num <- function(tri) as.numeric(substr(tri, 2, 2))

res_tri_real <- dat_real %>%
group_by(year = year_final, trimestre = tri_fix) %>%
summarise(
n_obs = n(),
masa_salarial_real = sum(ing_real * factor_hd),
suma_pesos = sum(factor_hd),
media_pond_real   = masa_salarial_real / suma_pesos,
media_simple_real = mean(ing_real),
.groups = "drop"
) %>%
mutate(t_index = year + q_num(trimestre)/10)

res_tri_real_w <- dat_real_w %>%
group_by(year = year_final, trimestre = tri_fix) %>%
summarise(
n_obs = n(),
masa_salarial_real = sum(ing_real * factor_hd),
suma_pesos = sum(factor_hd),
media_pond_real   = masa_salarial_real / suma_pesos,
media_simple_real = mean(ing_real),
.groups = "drop"
) %>%
mutate(t_index = year + q_num(trimestre)/10)

p_medias <- bind_rows(
res_tri_real   %>% mutate(version = "sin_winsor"),
res_tri_real_w %>% mutate(version = "winsor_p99_5")
) %>%
ggplot(aes(t_index, media_pond_real, color = version)) +
geom_line(size = 1) +
scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
labs(
title = "Ingreso real mensual: medias ponderadas trimestrales",
x = "Año (trimestre)", y = "Pesos"
) +
theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p_medias

p_masa <- res_tri_real_w %>%
ggplot(aes(t_index, masa_salarial_real)) +
geom_line(color = "#2E86AB", linewidth = 1.2) +
scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
labs(
title = "Masa salarial real trimestral (winsor p99.5)",
x = "Año (trimestre)", y = "Pesos"
) +
theme_minimal(base_size = 14)

p_masa
